company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that empowers content creators with AI-powered automated video editing. From smart cuts to AI-generated captions, AutoStream helps creators publish faster and smarter.

plans.name: Basic
plans.ideal_for: Hobbyists and beginners just starting out

refund.policy: No refunds after 7 days from subscription date.
refund.details: Users are eligible for a full refund within the first 7 days of any new subscription. After the 7-day window, subscriptions are non-refundable but can be cancelled to prevent future charges.

support.pro: 24/7 priority support via live chat and email. Dedicated account manager for annual Pro subscribers.

cancellation.policy: Cancel anytime. Access continues until end of billing period.
cancellation.details: There are no cancellation fees. Your account stays active until the end of the current billing cycle.

free_trial.details: New users can try the Pro plan free for 14 days. No credit card required.

faq.question: Can I switch plans?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately with prorated billing. Downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle.

faq.question: What video formats are supported?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM for input. Output is available in MP4 and MOV formats.

faq.question: Is there a free plan?
faq.answer: We don't have a permanently free plan, but we offer a 14-day free trial of the Pro plan — no credit card required.

faq.question: What platforms does AutoStream work with?
faq.answer: AutoStream integrates directly with YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn. You can also export and upload manually to any platform.
